task_completion.description: Verify the USLCI database is imported into OpenLCA.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenLCA 'Navigation' pane shows the USLCI database as an active, expanded database folder.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Recycled HDPE Pellet Production' process is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A process named 'Recycled HDPE Pellet Production' is visible in the Navigation pane under Processes, or its configuration tab is open in the main editor.

task_completion.description: Verify the process has at least one input and one output.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Inputs/Outputs' tab of the process shows an output representing 'Recycled HDPE pellets' in the Outputs section, and at least one item (e.g., electricity) in the Inputs section.

task_completion.description: Verify Actor 'Maria Chen' is created and linked as Data Generator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the process Administrative information or Modeling and validation tab, 'Maria Chen' is listed as the Data Generator. Alternatively, 'Maria Chen' is visible under Actors in the Navigation pane with the email 'm.chen@greenplastics.example.com' visible in her Actor tab.

task_completion.description: Verify Actor 'Prof. Robert Taylor' is created and linked as Reviewer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the process Administrative information or Modeling and validation tab, 'Prof. Robert Taylor' is listed as the Reviewer. Alternatively, 'Prof. Robert Taylor' is visible under Actors in the Navigation pane.

task_completion.description: Verify Source 'HDPE Recycling Energy Study 2023' is created and linked.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the process documentation tabs, 'HDPE Recycling Energy Study 2023' is listed as the Publication/Source. Alternatively, it is visible under Sources in the Navigation pane with the year 2023.

task_completion.description: Verify the process is exported as a JSON-LD file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An OpenLCA export dialog showing JSON-LD format and the destination path '~/LCA_Results/hdpe_process_export.zip', or a terminal/file manager showing this zip file exists in the LCA_Results directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OpenLCA graphical interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenLCA application window open and being interacted with, rather than just terminal commands.

integrity.description: Verify Actors and Sources were genuinely created in OpenLCA.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show OpenLCA entity creation forms or tabs for Actors and Sources, not just a text editor modifying a JSON file directly.

integrity.description: Verify the export was performed through OpenLCA.
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenLCA JSON-LD export wizard/dialog is visible in the screenshots, indicating the software generated the file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected export path is exactly '/home/ga/LCA_Results/hdpe_process_export.zip'. The import directory is '/home/ga/LCA_Imports'. The source year must be 2023. The email domain for Maria Chen is synthetic ('.example.com').
